entity.summary: Multichain decentralized exchange operating across Base and Arbitrum, preserved in current protocol registries with continuing liquidity and recent trading activity.
entity.notes: Current registry and protocol data preserve Alphix across Base and Arbitrum and report continuing liquidity with recent trading activity. A stable first-party application URL was not promoted in this review pass, so URL fields remain unknown while the exchange itself is classified active.
